scope.summary: G1 tokenizes the parser-only VECTOR_EMBEDDING bridge so only the bare, unqualified builtin with the exact model-USING-positional-bind grammar is normalized.
out_of_scope: The original SQL bytes and verdict-certificate digest remain authoritative; only a parser copy changes.
Raw caller SQL remains unable to invoke the verified-local vector embedding classification path.

entry_points.name: Classifier verified local vector embedding batch path
entry_points.trace: vector_embedding_batch_normalizes_only_for_parser_splitting proves a benign two-SELECT server-verified batch remains Safe with its certificate bound to the original bytes, while qualified, quoted, malformed, and DML-containing batches remain forbidden or destructive.

entry_points.name: Parser-only normalization boundary
entry_points.trace: vector_embedding_parser_normalization_rejects_lookalike_spelling proves the bridge rewrites the bare builtin but leaves qualified, comment-qualified, quoted, literal, and comment-spelled lookalikes byte-for-byte unchanged.

limitations: Scoped verification only: 317 oraclemcp-guard library tests in a clean detached worktree; no live Oracle run.
A full workspace gate is not claimed or run for this close.
